\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5507 introduces Underspecified Equation (Pending Review) as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \ddot u_k+\omega_k(t)^2 u_k=0. \label{eq:td_oscillator} \end{equation}
